digest: Verdict approve. Rigorous pass (2 reviewers) over merged plan @ plan_hash 2e2aae68: 4 HIGH advisory findings (missing waiver recorder task, manual-verdict/receipt-validator conflict, capability-event vs one-shot goals-load conflict, pre-freeze split-brain guard) folded at commit 151c991. Light re-pass (4 chunk reviewers) @ gate hash 5c09f486: approve, zero blocking; 9 residual implementer constraints captured in gate-plan-review-digest.txt (canonical check tuple, waiver-vs-skip semantics, gated manual mode, validateGoals/validateAmendment split, fail-closed pre-capture window on load-plan/continue, idempotent goals-load rerun, recorder-recomputed assessor cleanliness, single waive CLI shape, repo-root spec_refs). Preceded by mp-plan-reviewer FAIL(5 findings)->PASS cycle.
